---
title: "Investigate the dynamical stability a GPCR structure"
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
---

{{< include /includes/exercise_stab_gpcr_nav.html >}}

## Exercise

Excercise

<div class="nav-buttons">
  <a href="exercise_gpcr_stability_part_1.qmd" class="nav-btn prev-btn">&larr; Previous</a>

</div>
